articles.title: Livestream: Judge to announce verdict in the Kelsey Fitzsimmons trial
articles.description:

summary: Judge Jeffrey Karp will announce the Kelsey Fitzsimmons trial verdict at 1:30 p.m. Thursday.

Residents await the verdict, which may influence local perceptions of safety and legal proceedings.

articles.title: Trooper arrested in Boston for OUI was allegedly ‘slumped’ at the wheel with High Noon in cupholder
articles.description:
State Police Trooper Donovan Preston has pleaded not guilty to drunk driving and an open container violation.

The post Trooper arrested in Boston for OUI was allegedly ‘slumped’ at the wheel with High Noon in cupholder appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State Police Trooper Donovan Preston was arrested for OUI in Boston on March 26.
Preston was found allegedly slumped at the wheel with a High Noon drink in the cupholder.
The incident raises concerns about accountability among law enforcement in Boston.

articles.title: Closing arguments delivered in trial of Kelsey Fitzsimmons. Here’s what happened.
articles.description:

summary: Closing arguments in Kelsey Fitzsimmons' trial were delivered on March 26, 2026.

The trial outcome may influence local gun violence policies in Boston.

articles.title: 17-year-old killed in Brockton shooting, second fatal shooting in the city this week
articles.description:
An 18-year-old suspect has pleaded not guilty to murder and firearm-related charges, authorities say.

The post 17-year-old killed in Brockton shooting, second fatal shooting in the city this week appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 17-year-old was shot and killed in Brockton on March 26, 2026.
An 18-year-old suspect has pleaded not guilty to murder charges.
This marks the second fatal shooting in Brockton within the same week.
